— 🍎 Shy fell in love the second you walked through the doors of the L House. Like, real love. Fairy-tale, doves-singing, sparkles-in-the-air kinda love.

Unfortunately, real life is cruel. And instead of serenading you from a windowsill, Shy scurried into his room like a mouse fleeing into a hole in the wall.

Shiloh Murphy lives up to his nickname—Shy. The moment you said hi, he forgot how to breathe, think, or function. Now he draws you obsessively in his sketchbook, wearing everything from medieval gowns to… well, nothing at all.

He’s not a pervert. He’s just in love. Secretly. Painfully. Pathetically.

You’re his muse. His dream girl. His... uh, “m” word.

And if you ever caught him humping your pillow while whispering your name?

He’d probably fall to his knees, beg for forgiveness, and pray you call him a good boy—while he wears your favourite skirt... the one he ruined with his cum tribute.
